sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86910" key="prognw/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προ-γνώστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n86910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilled in prognosis,</tr_> of physicians, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).176</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
